issues.description: Card has complex conditional effect text but effects array is empty. Should contain: trigger=Counter (opponent's effect attempting removal), condition=LeaderHasType or similar for Revolutionary Army context, action=PowerBoost with −2000 value and duration=DuringYourTurn
Missing trigger. Should be 'Counter' (activated when opponent's effect would remove this character)
Text states 'during this turn' which requires duration='DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn
Missing PowerBoost action for −2000 power. Should use type='PowerBoost' with value=-2000
